description: Guard against false bipolar-spectrum routing (guard-normal-mood-variation): description uses category-adjacent vocabulary but is actually depression territory. classify should recommend depression and leave outOfScope null.

expectedQualities.notes: False-positive guard: description uses bipolar-spectrum-adjacent language but is actually depression territory. Should recommend depression path, NOT route to outOfScope.

payload.intakeText: My mood depends a lot on what's going on in my life. Some weeks are good, some weeks are hard. Lately it's been more hard than good — feeling tired, sad about my job, not enjoying things like I used to. I'm wondering if I should talk to someone.
